form.formComment: Recorded a 3.5 lengths win (18.64) in a Class 5 last time at Manukau. Goes very well from the draw boasting seven victories and four places from 21 starts. Cannot be left out of combinations.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (21.55) in a Class 5, finishing a 6 length fifth. Has three successes and eight minors from 18 starts from box 3. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when seventh (21.90) at this track. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 375m in 21.07 last start, beating Boston Junior. Has a solid record from this box, including six wins. Go close.
